description:
Girl's Clover Print 2-Piece Set, Short Sleeve T-Shirt and Flare Leg Pants for Spring and Summer

Embrace the luck of the season with our Girl's Clover Print 2-Piece Set, featuring a cheerful clover pattern that symbolizes good fortune. This adorable coordinated set includes a soft short-sleeve T-shirt paired with comfortable flare-leg pants featuring an elastic waistband for easy dressing and all-day play. Perfect for spring and summer adventures, the lightweight fabric and relaxed fit allow for unrestricted movement whether she's exploring outdoors, enjoying playdates, or simply having fun in the sun. The lucky clover design adds a touch of whimsy to everyday outfits.

Crafted from a gentle blend of 95% Polyester and 5% Spandex, this set offers comfortable stretch, durable wear, and easy-care convenience. The fabric maintains its vibrant clover print and shape through active play and multiple washes.

Highlighted Features:

  • Lucky Clover Print: Playful clover pattern symbolizing good fortune and happiness

  • Comfortable Elastic Waist: Easy-wear pants with gentle stretch for active movement

  • Breathable Short Sleeves: Perfect for warmer spring and summer weather

  • Playful Flare Leg Design: Fashionable wide-leg cut that allows freedom of movement

  • Complete Matching Set: Coordinated top and bottom for effortless styling

Available in sizes: 4Y, 5Y, 6Y, 7Y. This charming set will keep your little girl feeling lucky and looking stylish during all her spring and summer adventures.
